ai_analysis.quality_summary: Significant priority assignment issues identified. Multiple P1 cases (active homelessness, imminent eviction) incorrectly assigned No Priority. Many cases lack caseworker interaction despite urgent needs. Several cases appear to be in wrong workflow stages.

flags.reason: Active homelessness case incorrectly assigned P3 instead of P1
Served eviction notice case should be P2 not P3
Rent arrears close to eviction with infant should be P2
Family violence with housing crisis should be P1
Crisis accommodation due to DV and health issues should be P1
Single mother with four children in extreme difficulty should be P1
Funeral debt should be P1 per framework
Deceased husband debt settlement should be P1 as funeral-related
New parents with special needs baby should be P2
Parent unable to work due to child's hospitalization should be P2

patterns: High number of cases with No Priority assignment despite urgent needs
Many cases lack caseworker interaction despite being in system
Inconsistent application of P1 criteria for homelessness and family violence
Funeral/burial costs not consistently prioritized as P1
